behavior_summary: U8P_ABACUS::look: When the player examines the abacus, the script displays the short description text "abacus" and then suspends. This is a simple U8P_ABACUS::look/description handler.

U8P_ABACUS::use: When the player uses the abacus, the script computes a total number of "obsidian coins" the relevant actor has by checking an equipment slot and/or item handles, accumulates their quantities, formats the total using a numeric-to-string conversion, performs simple pluralization of "coin/coins", displays a message such as "You have X obsidian coin(s)", then clears the constructed string and suspends.
notable_control_flow: U8P_ABACUS::look emits a single Bark with the short text and then suspends (one-shot descriptive flow).

U8P_ABACUS::use initializes a numeric accumulator (local1 = 0), conditionally calls Npc::getEquip(slot=0x06, actor) and checks the result against a sentinel (0xFFFFFFFF) to determine presence of an item, calls Item::getQuantity on found item references to add to local1, converts local1 to text with numToStr, appends " obsidian coin" and adds an "s" when local1 != 1, barks the constructed message, then clears the string and suspends.
Control relies on simple conditional guards (item-present checks) rather than global flags; no persistent flags are read or written.
open_questions: Which actor/context is being inspected by U8P_ABACUS::use (player, the object owner, or another NPC)? The actor pointer is referenced on the stack in the raw code but not named in the JSON.

Are multiple equipment slots or other inventory sources consulted beyond the single slot 0x06 observed in the code sample? The disassembly shows slot 0x06 but additional inventory checks may be present in other builds.

Exact mapping of local2/local3 to engine types (item handle vs. item pointer) is inferred from call patterns; the precise types and error-handling behavior (beyond the 0xFFFFFFFF sentinel) remain uncertain.

main_function.name: U8P_ABACUS::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the object's short description when the player examines the abacus.
entry_conditions: Triggered by the player's 'U8P_ABACUS::look' or inspect action on the abacus (process type 0x0208).

function_map.name: U8P_ABACUS::use
function_map.role: Compute and display the actor's obsidian coin total; builds and barks a message with pluralization

function_map.name: Npc::getEquip
function_map.role: Query an NPC/eactor's equipment slot to obtain an item handle/id (returns 0xFFFFFFFF when empty)

function_map.name: Item::getQuantity
function_map.role: Return quantity/count for an item reference so it can be added to the accumulator

function_map.name: numToStr
function_map.role: Convert numeric accumulator to a string for message construction

external_calls.purpose: Check a specific equipment slot (0x06) on the actor/context and obtain an item handle; return value compared to 0xFFFFFFFF to detect absence.
Obtain the quantity of a discovered item to add into the running obsidian-coin total (local1).
Convert the numeric total (local1) to a string for inclusion in the user-facing message.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: U8P_ABACUS::look: When the player examines the abacus, the script displays the short description text "abacus" and then suspends. This is a simple U8P_ABACUS::look/description handler.
